publications.title: CRISPR-Cas9 genome editing in human embryonic stem cells
publications.abstract: We demonstrate efficient CRISPR-Cas9 mediated genome editing in human embryonic stem cells with 95% efficiency and minimal off-target effects. Our approach maintains cell viability and pluripotency markers.

publications.title: Single-cell RNA sequencing reveals novel neuronal populations in human cortex
publications.abstract: Using single-cell RNA sequencing, we identified 15 previously unknown neuronal cell types in the human prefrontal cortex with distinct molecular signatures and connectivity patterns.

publications.title: Structural basis of SARS-CoV-2 spike protein receptor binding
publications.abstract: Crystal structure of SARS-CoV-2 spike protein reveals key interactions with ACE2 receptor at 2.1 Å resolution, providing insights for therapeutic development.

publications.title: Genome-wide association study identifies 50 loci for type 2 diabetes
publications.abstract: GWAS meta-analysis of 500,000 individuals reveals 50 novel genetic loci associated with type 2 diabetes risk, implicating new biological pathways.

publications.title: Evolutionary analysis of CRISPR systems across bacterial phyla
publications.abstract: Comprehensive phylogenetic analysis reveals horizontal gene transfer patterns of CRISPR-Cas systems in bacteria, with implications for adaptive immunity evolution.

publications.title: Metabolic engineering of E. coli for sustainable biofuel production
publications.abstract: We engineered E. coli strains producing biodiesel precursors at industrial scale with 85% theoretical yield using renewable feedstocks.

publications.title: Epigenetic regulation of stem cell differentiation
publications.abstract: We identify key histone modifications controlling lineage commitment in pluripotent stem cells, revealing chromatin remodeling dynamics during differentiation.

publications.title: Microbiome composition influences metabolic health in humans
publications.abstract: Metagenomic analysis of 10,000 individuals reveals gut microbiome signatures associated with metabolic syndrome and obesity.

publications.title: Protein-protein interactions in mTOR signaling pathway
publications.abstract: Comprehensive interactome mapping reveals 150 novel mTOR pathway interactions, expanding our understanding of growth regulation.

publications.title: Mitochondrial dysfunction in Alzheimer's disease pathogenesis
publications.abstract: We demonstrate that mitochondrial dysfunction precedes amyloid plaque formation in Alzheimer's disease, suggesting new therapeutic targets.
